$comment: Pins the pult release bundled as this app's sidecar. Bumping the sidecar means editing this one file: update version, then replace every sha256 below with the checksums of the new release's assets (download each asset from https://github.com/lonic-software/pult/releases/tag/v<version> and run `shasum -a 256 <asset>` yourself — don't just copy the release's own checksums.txt, since that only guards against corruption, not a compromised release upload). scripts/fetch-pult-sidecar.mjs reads this file and hard-fails on any mismatch.
